variant: 7,000 lb capacity two-post turf vehicle lift

specifications.column_material: 3/4 inch thick forklift mast, 4 inch wide sections

features: 7,000 lb capacity specifically for turf maintenance equipment
Adjustable lifting forks for all wheelbase ranges
Forks expand and contract for different tire sizes
Rear trough design for flexible equipment accommodation
Twin heavy duty cylinders for safer, steadier lifting
8 double-sealed self-lubricating steel ball bearing rollers per carriage
Designed, welded, and manufactured in the USA

optional_equipment.description: Additional accessories for turf equipment service

safety_features: Twin heavy duty cylinders for stability
notes: Warranty: 25 years structural, 10 year mechanical, limited lifetime hydraulic cylinder
Specifically designed for turf maintenance equipment (mowers, utility vehicles, etc.)
